mapper.select: SELECT address_id, user_id, alias, zipcode, address, address_detail, is_default, status_code, created_at, updated_at, deleted_yn, deleted_at FROM USER_ADDRESSES WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USER_ADDRESSES WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status_code = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ADDRESSES ( user_id, alias, zipcode, address, address_detail, is_default, status_code, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{alias}, #{zipcode}, #{address, typeHandler=aesTypeHandler}, #{addressDetail, typeHandler=aesTypeHandler}, #{isDefault}, #{statusCode}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_ADDRESSES SET is_default = 'N' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND is_default = 'Y'

UPDATE USER_ADDRESSES SET deleted_yn = 'Y', deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', status_code = 'DISABLED', is_default = 'N' WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
